package rulecoverage

func NegativeLikelyNSquaredAllocation() string {
    ruleID := "likely_n_squared_allocation"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "experimental"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Opt-in deeper semantic signal for allocations that also sit inside nested loop structure."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
